fr:title.text: Guard Your Daggers and Traces: On The Equational Properties of Guarded

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Guard Your Daggers and Traces: On The Equational Properties of Guarded
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: @article{milius-litak-2017, author = {Milius, Stefan and Litak, Tadeusz}, publisher = {IOS Press}, year = {2017}, doi = {10.3233/FI-2017-1475}, journal = {Fundamenta Informaticae}, number = {3-4}, pages = {407--449}, title = {Guard Your Daggers and Traces: Properties of Guarded (Co-)recursion}, volume = {150}, }
